code: import api from'./api';class AssessmentService{async generateAssessment(request){const response=await api.post('/assessments/generate',request);return response.data;}async submitAssessment(submission){const response=await api.post('/assessments/submit',submission);return response.data;}async getAssessmentHistory(assessmentType,targetId){const params=new URLSearchParams();if(assessmentType)params.append('assessment_type',assessmentType);if(targetId)params.append('target_id',targetId);const response=await api.get("/assessments/history?".concat(params.toString()));return response.data.assessments;}async getRemainingAttempts(targetId,assessmentType){const response=await api.get("/assessments/attempts/".concat(targetId,"?assessment_type=").concat(assessmentType));return response.data;}async initiateRetake(request){const response=await api.post('/assessments/retake',request);return response.data;}async getBestScores(userId){const response=await api.get("/assessments/best-scores/".concat(userId));return response.data;}}export default new AssessmentService();
